description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow set within a rectangular plot, surrounded by a low white perimeter wall and landscaped with several trees and green lawns. The structure features a flat roof and a combination of large glass windows and solid wall sections, providing a contemporary aesthetic. The front of the bungalow includes a paved driveway leading to the main entrance, flanked by trees and a small patio area. The rear of the property contains a spacious backyard with additional green space and what appears to be a patio or outdoor seating area. The layout of the bungalow is open, with visible interior divisions for rooms, and the use of glass allows for ample natural light. The materials used are primarily concrete, glass, and wood, with metal likely used for window frames and structural elements.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and landscaped surroundings within a walled plot. The design features open interiors, a paved driveway, and a spacious backyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and patio area with trees and a clear view of the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long white perimeter wall, green lawn, and a glimpse of the backyard patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional green space, and large glass windows opening to the outdoor area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the bungalow, the white wall, and the arrangement of rooms and windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
